titleStmt.title: SII 5.418: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 418. (A.R. No. 129 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4vatu siṁ hanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum nāyaṟṟuk
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṉināḷ Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil Ādi caṇḍeśva rade varkku kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelveli
k kaikkoṭ ceṉāpatikaḷom vilaipramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyaṉāyaṉāṟkut tirumuṭi ttu A
ṟukum tāḷippūvu(m)ñ cātti Iṭaikaṭṭu maṭattil Irukkum tiruttoṇṭiśvara- tevaṟku Ivvūr patiyilāril kūttaṉ nampirāṭṭiyāṉa
ceyyaperumāḷ talaikkoliēṉ tiruviṭaikkaṭṭil maṭattil tirumeṉikaḷil nampiyāruraṉṉāṉa yirākkatapperumāḷukkum nampiyā
ruraṟkum jivaṉattukku kūttaṉ nampirāṭṭiyāṉa maṉañceytaperumāḷ talaikkoli Eṅkaḷpakkal vilaikoṇṭu Iṭṭa nilamāvatu muḷḷināṭṭu prahma
de yam ceravaṉmakāteviccaturvetimaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai pattanmaṭaiyilān jivitam kaikkoṇṭamaiyil cemme vākkālukkuk kiḻakkum virake
raḷappilāṟṟukku teṟku pattoṉpatāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñceyil teṟkaṭaiya nilam 6- m Itaṉ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñceyil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam 6- m Innilamorumāvum
Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Ivarpakkal koṇṭu ciṟukālaiccantikku Aṟukum tāḷippūvuñ cāttip paṟikkiṟa tiruttoṇṭarkaḷil nampiyārurar Irākkataṟkum nampiyārūraṟkum
jīvaṉattukku viṟṟu vilaippramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ādicaṇḍeśva rade vaṟku kaikkoṭ ceṉāpatikaḷom viṟṟukkuṭutta Innilattukkuk kaṭamai Antarāyam poṉvari
Uḻutāṉkuṭi maṟṟeppeṟpaṭṭa cilvariyun taṉ Iṟuppārākavum meṟpaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyolaiyum Ituve poruḷcelavolai Āvatāka
vum Ituvallatu veṟuvilaiyāvaṇac cilāvaṇap poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcilavolai(k) kāṭṭavuṅ kāṇavuṅ kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kārāṇmai Uṭpaṭa vi
laikkuṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ . Innilam candrā tityavaṟ Ivvirākkataṟkum nampiyārūraṟkkum Ivarkaḷ vaṟkattāṟum Ivvaṟukun tāḷippū
vum Iṭṭu Aṉupavippārākavum kallile veṭṭikkoḷvārākavum vayaltalaiyile tiruccūlakkallu nāṭṭikkoḷvārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaipramā ṇam paṇṇik
kuṭuttom Ādicaṇḍeśvarade vaṟku tirunelveli kaikkoṭceṉāpatikaḷom . Ivai śrīkulacekaraccittarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aticeyapāṇṭiya vattarāyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai vikkiramapāṇṭiya vattarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṉakarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻutipaṉmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Ivvilaippramā ṇam E
ḻutiṉeṉ centiṟattuk kūttapperumāḷ Eḻuttu—
Digital edition of SII 5.418 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
